india_trends.title: IEX Q4 Results: Net profit rises 11% YoY to ₹130 crore; board declares ₹2 final dividend
india_trends.summary: Indian Energy Exchange reported a 10.8% YoY increase in net profit to ₹129.8 crore for Q4. Revenue rose 12.5% YoY to ₹196.4 crore. The company achieved record electricity trading volumes and announced a final dividend of ₹2 per share, pending approval.

india_trends.title: Infosys Q4 results 2026: Headcount falls by 8,400 even as operating profits jump 13.6% YoY
india_trends.summary: The IT giant’s last twelve-month (LTM) attrition rate has increased from 12.3% in Q3 to 12.6% in Q4 of FY26.

india_trends.title: Premji Invest backs Maharashtra-based hospital chain NewEra Hospitals
india_trends.summary: Premji Invest has funded NewEra Hospitals to expand its Maharashtra footprint from 350 to 800 beds. The capital will help launch three new facilities in Nagpur to bridge regional quaternary healthcare gaps.

india_trends.summary: Yezdi and BSA have launched two new scrambler motorcycles in India. The Yezdi Scrambler 350 and BSA Scrambler 650 aim to capture the growing premium scrambler market. india_trends.title: Hindustan Power gets 100-MW solar project from Punjab government
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Power announced a 100 MW solar project in Punjab, awarded via competitive bidding. The project includes a 25-year power purchase agreement, ensuring long-term revenue and clean energy support. Commissioning is anticipated within 24 months.

india_trends.summary: Navi Mumbai International Airport (NMIA) is projected to handle 50,000 passengers and 380 flights daily by year-end. india_trends.title: US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slide up to 0.7% as oil rally dents sentiment; Brent reclaims $100
india_trends.summary: US equity index futures are lower as crude oil prices rise above $100. The S&amp;P 500 and Nasdaq hit record highs, but tensions with Iran are dampening sentiment. The Federal Reserve may delay rate cuts due to inflation concerns amid ongoing Middle East conflicts.
